title: Easy Survival Mod
description: Configurable QoL survival tweaks: keep XP on death, auto-smelt ores, tree chopper, item magnet, auto-feed, and more. Press Y to open settings.
body:
# Easy Survival Plus

Make Minecraft survival less grindy! This mod adds configurable Quality of Life features that keep the vanilla feel while reducing tedious tasks.

##  Features

###  Death Protection
- **Keep Experience**: Retains your XP level and progress on death (vanilla `keepInventory` clears XP!)

###  Mining Enhancement  
- **Auto-Smelt Ores**: Iron, Gold, and Copper ores drop ingots directly - no furnace needed!
- **Output Multiplier**: Get 1-5x ingots per ore (configure in settings)

###  Quality of Life
- **Tree Chopper**: Break one log, the entire tree falls down (configurable block limit)
- **Item Magnet**: Automatically pulls items from 5 blocks away
- **Infinite Durability**: Tools never break (optional, disabled by default)
- **Instant Eating**: Removes eating animation for quick healing (optional)
- **Auto Plant**: Walk on farmland with seeds to auto-plant (optional)
- **Auto Feed**: Automatically eats food when hunger is low (optional)

##  How to Use

1. **Open Config**: Press `Y` (default key, changeable in Controls) to open the settings GUI
2. **Commands**: Use `/es reload` to reload config without restarting
3. **Manual Edit**: Edit `config/easysurvivalmod.json` in your game directory

##  Requirements

- **Fabric Loader** (1.20.1)
- **Fabric API** 
- **Cloth Config API** (Required for settings GUI)

##  Optional
- **Mod Menu**

##  Configuration

All features can be toggled individually:
- Master switch to enable/disable everything
- Each feature has its own toggle
- Adjustable values (tree limit, smelt multiplier)

**Note**: This mod is client-server compatible. Install on server for multiplayer support.
